description_long: This is a modern, single-seat chaise with a boxy silhouette and a low, wide profile. The seat and backrest are upholstered in a light gray fabric, while the outer shell, including the armrests and back, is covered in a contrasting dark material. The chaise features a thick, plush seat cushion and a matching back cushion, both of which appear to be loose and generously padded for comfort. The armrests are integrated into the frame, curving smoothly from the backrest to the front, creating a cozy, enclosed seating area. The chaise stands on four slender, black metal legs that elevate it slightly above the ground, giving it a light and airy appearance. The overall design is minimalist and contemporary, suitable for urban parks, lobbies, or modern outdoor lounges.
description: A modern, boxy chaise with light gray upholstery, dark outer shell, and slim black metal legs. Features plush seat and back cushions with integrated armrests for a cozy, contemporary look.
description_view_0: Front view shows the wide seat, thick cushion, and both armrests curving forward, with the back cushion visible.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the depth of the seat, the thickness of the cushions, and the smooth curve of the armrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the solid, dark backrest and the slim metal legs, with no cushions visible.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the armrest curve and cushion thickness from the opposite side.
attribute_backrest_design: The backrest is medium-height, gently curved, and fully upholstered in a dark material, providing a continuous, smooth surface with no visible segmentation or decorative elements.
attribute_armrest_presence: Armrests are present on both sides, integrated into the frame, and curve smoothly from the backrest to the front.
attribute_leg_style: The legs are straight, slender, and made of black metal, with a minimalist design and no decorative elements.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: The upholstery is solid-colored with a smooth, matte texture and no visible patterns, tufting, or quilting.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: There are two loose cushions: one thick seat cushion and one matching back cushion, both rectangular and generously padded, placed within the frame for comfort.
